creator: forumforeign@gmail.com
text:
I have a problem pool, with which a have a loop kernel panic at boot process

panic: Solaris(panic): zfs: allocating allocated segment(offset=34630775808 size=4096)

If i disable zfs (in /etc/rc.conf, /boot/loader.conf) then boot continue without any errors. If after boot i try to run one of this command

#zpool list
#zpool status

i received a kernel panic.

Below a full chash report
